name: Off-Mic Podcast Launch
description: Independent podcast production: pilot edits, guest coordination, landing page, newsletter, and Oct 2 public debut. Asha owns this outright, not through the station.

name: Voices of the City S3
description: Season 3 community profiles. Weekly Tuesday feature on The Asha Show. Currently tracking toward Oct 27 finale with Alexandra elder.

name: Rhythm FM 30th Anniversary Documentary
description: 3-part documentary series on Johannesburg radio history for the Nov 2026 anniversary programming. Collaboration with Sipho.
